items.line_en: For the first time in forever.

coach.say: For the first time in forever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: For the first time in forever.

items.line_en: One thing you may not realize is just how personal the making of this movie really was.

coach.say: One thing you may not realize is just how personal the making of this movie really was.
coach.hint: Chunk it: One thing you may not realize is just how personal the making of this movie really was.

items.line_en: Like, did you know that the songwriters are actually a husband and wife team, and that young princess Anna is sung by their daughter?

coach.say: Like, did you know that the songwriters are actually a husband and wife team, and that young princess Anna is sung by their daughter?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Like, / did you know that the songwriters are actually a husband and wife team, / and that young princess Anna is sung by their daughter?

items.line_en: Robin Kristin's daughter, Katie, did the scratch voice for, like, little Anna, and my daughter did the scratch voice for the nine-year-old Anna.

coach.say: Robin Kristin's daughter, Katie, did the scratch voice for, like, little Anna, and my daughter did the scratch voice for the nine-year-old Anna.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Robin Kristin's daughter, Katie, / did the scratch voice for, like, little Anna, and my daughter did the scratch voice for the nine-year-old Anna.

items.line_en: And there was a sweet vulnerability in naivete and it's just purity, and we wanted to capture that.

coach.say: And there was a sweet vulnerability in naivete and it's just purity, and we wanted to capture that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And there was a sweet vulnerability in naivete and it's just purity, / and we wanted to capture that.

items.line_en: It gets a little lonely, all these empty moves, just watching me ask, take bye.

coach.say: It gets a little lonely, all these empty moves, just watching me ask, take bye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It gets a little lonely, / all these empty moves, / just watching me ask, / take bye.

items.line_en: Our kids inspired these characters a lot, and then to have them in playing parts and editors, it comes full circle.

coach.say: Our kids inspired these characters a lot, and then to have them in playing parts and editors, it comes full circle.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Our kids inspired these characters a lot, / and then to have them in playing parts and editors, / it comes full circle.
